archimate:DataObject.name: Official Portal for European Data
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The portal is a central point of access to European open data from international, European Union, national, regional, local and geodata portals.
Publisher: The Publications Office of the European Union
Source: https://data.europa.eu/en
LOST view: SV-Metadata Catalogue
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/OfficialPortalForEuropeanDataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/OfficialPortalForEuropeanDataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: The Publications Office of the European Union
The portal is a central point of access to European open data from international, European Union, national, regional, local and geodata portals.
